dashboard.title: Your garden
dashboard.subtitle: Each seed is one thing you're growing — a job, a habit, a goal
dashboard.emptyBody: One seed = one specific thing. For jobs, that's one company. Pick a theme and start growing.

seed.fileHint: Max 10 MB. PDF, Word, text, or image.

customize.title: Customize stages & tasks
customize.hint: Stages can have fields and tasks. Tasks can have sub-tasks and fields. Check off each field when done — task % follows sub-tasks or fields; stage % follows tasks.
customize.empty: No stages yet. Add your first stage or they will come from the theme when you plant a seed.
customize.fieldCountsTowardProgressHint: Shows a completion checkbox and affects task %
customize.fieldInfoOnlyHint: Data field only — no checkbox, not included in progress
customize.deleteStageConfirm: Delete this stage and everything inside it?
customize.hintDnD: Drag the ⋮⋮ handle to reorder stages. Define tasks, sub-tasks, and input fields here. Enter data on the seed page.

themes.title: Themes
themes.subtitle: Templates for planting seeds — customize stages, tasks, and fields before you start
themes.systemHint: System themes are read-only. Use “Duplicate to edit” to create your own copy.
themes.editSubtitle: Edit stages, tasks, sub-tasks, and input fields on tasks
themes.saveAsNamePrompt: Theme name (e.g. My job search flow)

newSeed.title: Plant a new seed
newSeed.subtitle: Choose a theme, then customize fields and tasks for this specific seed
newSeed.seedTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Senior Engineer at Acme Corp
